body:
## Summary
- Add generic `facet` blocks to both meaning records and word forms, with facet kinds and targets resolved as seed meanings instead of Rust-only constants.
- Derive `notation -> word_surface` and `denotation -> parent meaning` for every parsed word form from the existing `lexeme`/`word` seed structure, so all 4,416 literal surfaces expose recursive semantic links at runtime.
- Add explicit word-form facets for the semantic meta-language and new lexical meta-language meanings, including `word_surface`, `lexical_form`, `lexical_sense`, `part_of_speech`, `noun`, and `noun_phrase`.
- Add `docs/case-studies/issue-398/meaning-data-model-alternatives.md` with five alternative meaning data model variants and a hardcoded-English seed audit.

## Review follow-up
The 2026-06-06 PR feedback said the first meaning structure was too shallow and still depended on hardcoded English descriptions. This update keeps `gloss` and `description` as transitional human annotations, but the executable model no longer requires consumers to read those descriptions to understand a word surface: every parsed word exposes meaning-linked notation and denotation facets, and tests enforce those links across the whole seed.

The five documented variants are:
- Recursive Facet Seed
- Reified Statement Model
- OntoLex-Style Lexical Entries and Senses
- SKOS Concept Scheme Model
- Typed Hyperlink or Holon Model

## Reproduction and verification
- Pre-fix repro: `cargo test --test source semantic_facet -- --nocapture` failed because semantic facet parser/query APIs did not exist.
- `scripts/sync-seed.sh --check`
- `cargo test --test source seed::meanings -- --nocapture`
- `cargo test semantic_facet -- --nocapture`
- `cargo fmt -- --check`
- `rust-script scripts/check-file-size.rs` (warnings only, no violations)
- `npm run --prefix tests/e2e check:language-test-coverage`
- `cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features`
- `cargo test`
- `cargo test --doc`

## Research sources
- Wikidata data model: https://www.wikidata.org/wiki/Help:Data_model
- Wikidata lexicographical data: https://www.wikidata.org/wiki/Wikidata:Lexicographical_data/Documentation
- RDF 1.2 Concepts: https://www.w3.org/TR/rdf12-concepts/
- SKOS Reference: https://www.w3.org/TR/skos-reference/
- OntoLex-Lemon: https://www.w3.org/2016/04/ontolex/
- WordNet documentation: https://wordnet.princeton.edu/documentation

Fixes #398
title: Add recursive semantic facets to meanings and word forms
